properties.query: select c.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, pr.professor_name from 강의 c join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id

select en.student_id, st.student_name, en.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, pr.professor_name, en.enroll_date from 수강 en join 학생 st on en.student_id = st.student_id join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id where en.student_id = ? order by class_no asc
delete from 수강 where student_id = ? and class_no = ?
